Headline: #86 Narragansett/Ridgeland Temporary Northbound Reroute near Avondale/Nagel
ShortDescription: Northbound 86 Narragansett/Ridgeland buses are temporarily rerouted: due to, police activity near Avondale/Nagel.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #86 Narragansett/Ridgeland buses are temporarily rerouted via Nagel, Bryn Mawr, Northwest Highway,  and Nagel: due to, police activity near Avondale/Nagel.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
